_comment: Declarative news-gdelt endpoint registry. Adds an endpoint = adds an entry here. The topic list comes from /news/topics itself (data-driven via q_values_from); when DEFAULT_TOPICS in gdelt.ts changes, the snapshot follows automatically on next run.
_run_order: Endpoints are fetched in declared order. `topics` MUST come before `articles/timeline/tone` because the latter three reference dist/topics.json via q_values_from to enumerate topic values.

auth._note: GDELT data is public. The api hub default auth (Authelia 2FA / bearer) will gate it once exposed publicly through Caddy; the snapshotter respects whatever auth the spec declares.

endpoints.name: health
endpoints.description: Liveness probe — {status, cachedTopics, totalArticles, lastFetch, uptime}

endpoints.name: topics
endpoints.description: Topic registry — 8 topics from gdelt.ts DEFAULT_TOPICS. Used as q_values source for articles/timeline/tone.

endpoints.name: articles
endpoints.description: GDELT articles slice for each topic — limit=50. Cold-fetch ~10s per topic (live call to api.gdeltproject.org).

endpoints.name: timeline
endpoints.description: Article timeline (volume by date) per topic. Cold-fetch ~10s per topic.

endpoints.name: tone
endpoints.description: Tone analysis (avg/min/max sentiment) per topic. Cold-fetch ~10s per topic.
